title: a message in a capsule at the bottom
subtitle: Holding desire without surrendering the center; the ignition of mature risk
description: An artifact documenting a structural correction in the management of desire. It captures a moment of active restraint where identity is intentionally separated from outcome, marking a shift from reactive over-investment or avoidance to a disciplined, observant entry into experience.

motifMap.meaning: The internal center that remains unsurrendered despite deep feeling.
Entering experience carefully without collapsing or running.

excerpt: I am not placing my identity in the success of this.
